description: Style NoteTake a refined approach to workwear bags with bulchee's Spring '12 line. The line has minimal hardware and are delectably hued (and are crafted from handpicked materials) so you'll want more than just one. Guaranteed to leave you "bag-struck", punctuate your everyday ensemble with this uber cool bag.Product DetailsCroc hide style texturing on a black upperHas two short handles with a hanging decorationFlap with a twist and lift closure with one pocket on the frontOne main zipped compartment with a zipped pocket, a zipped separator and two pouchesOne zipped pocket at the back Material and Care LeatheretteWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not expose to detergents, alcohol or petroleumSizeHeight: 24 cmWidth: 34 cmDepth: 11 cm
